case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. DON JERIC SPAULDING

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $369.83 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPAULDING, DON JERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT NARALLANA SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DON JERIC SPAULDING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
